title: AI Developer Radar｜Daily｜2026-06-07
summary: Today's dominant pattern is a surge in AI workflow automation and agentic coding tools, driven by two projects with sudden breakout acceleration: career-ops (3.7x acceleration, +631 stars in 24h) and ai-engineering-from-scratch (sustained hot, +640 stars daily). Both projects target practical, production-oriented use cases—job search automation and comprehensive AI engineering education—suggesting developer interest is shifting from experimental agents to applied, real-world workflows. The MCP ecosystem also shows strength, with claude-context (2.1x acceleration) enabling semantic code search for agents, and ccpm (2.4x acceleration) turning agents into structured project managers. Cross-source confirmation is weak today, with only two HN posts tangentially related to AI coding tools, but the sustained high velocity of these projects indicates a genuine shift toward agentic productivity tools rather than one-day hype. If this pattern holds, expect more projects that bridge AI agents with existing developer workflows (GitHub, job boards, codebases) to emerge.
dataNotes: GitHub API 只提供当前 stars，总量变化来自本项目保存的历史 snapshot。
daily delta 使用约 24h 前 snapshot，weekly delta 使用约 7 天前 snapshot。
Accelerating 只展示至少 3 天历史基线且今日 delta 超过前 3 日均值 2 倍的项目。
Potential Score 为规则评分，用于排序，不代表项目质量结论。

llmSummary.oneLiner: A massive, free, open-source curriculum (503 lessons, 20 phases) that teaches AI engineering from math foundations to production-grade agents, swarms, and MCP servers.
llmSummary.problemSolved: Most AI learning resources are scattered, shallow, or API-focused. This curriculum provides a structured, end-to-end path where every algorithm is built from scratch (raw math first) and every lesson ships a reusable artifact (prompt, skill, agent, or MCP server), bridging the gap between theory and real-world deployment.
llmSummary.whyNow: With 29,402 stars, a 24h delta of +916, a 7d delta of +8,302, and a three-day average of 3,693 stars/day, this repo is experiencing sustained explosive growth. The acceleration of 0.2 (medium) indicates steady, compounding interest rather than a single viral spike. Over 150,000 readers and 241,000 page views in the last 30 days confirm broad, ongoing engagement.
llmSummary.whatChanged: No single obvious trigger — the project appears to be sustaining organic growth. The README was recently updated (pushed 2026-06-07), and the curriculum continues to expand (503 lessons, 20 phases). The sustained high star velocity over 7 days suggests word-of-mouth and community adoption rather than a one-time event.
llmSummary.whyTrending: It fills a clear gap: developers want to understand AI deeply, not just use APIs. The promise of building everything from scratch, shipping real artifacts, and covering the full stack (math → agents → production) resonates strongly. The creator's prior project (Agent Memory, also popular) lends credibility.
llmSummary.developerTakeaway: This is a comprehensive, hands-on resource for any developer serious about AI engineering. It's free, MIT-licensed, and designed to be run locally. The structured phases and built-in agent skills (/find-your-level, /check-understanding) make it easy to jump in at the right level.
llmSummary.developerInsight: The market is hungry for deep, practical AI education that goes beyond surface-level tutorials. Projects that combine rigorous fundamentals with production-ready outputs (MCP servers, agents) are gaining traction. This signals a shift toward 'learn by building' and 'ship as you learn' workflows.
llmSummary.targetUsers: Software engineers, ML engineers, data scientists, and students who want to understand AI from the ground up and build production-grade AI systems. Suitable for beginners with coding experience through to experienced practitioners looking to fill gaps.
llmSummary.riskNotes: The curriculum is massive (~320 hours) and may overwhelm casual learners. Some phases are still in progress (indicated by 'coming soon' placeholders). The project's long-term maintenance and completeness depend on the creator's continued effort.

llmSummary.oneLiner: An open-source AI-powered job search command center that uses Claude Code and other AI CLIs to evaluate, tailor, and track applications at scale.
llmSummary.problemSolved: Job seekers waste months manually sifting through hundreds of listings, customizing resumes, and tracking applications. Career-Ops automates the entire pipeline: it scans job portals, evaluates offers against your profile using structured scoring, generates ATS-optimized PDFs, and maintains a single source of truth — all while keeping the human in the loop for final decisions.
llmSummary.whyNow: With 48,963 stars, a 24-hour delta of +223, and a 7-day delta of +1,116, this repo is experiencing sustained high-velocity growth. The acceleration ratio of 1.3 indicates steady, organic momentum rather than a sudden spike. The project has a recent release and active commits within the last 7 days, signaling ongoing maintenance and community engagement. It's trending because it directly addresses a universal pain point — job hunting — with a practical, AI-driven solution that resonates with a massive audience.
llmSummary.whatChanged: No single obvious trigger — the project appears to be sustaining organic growth. The consistent star velocity over the past week (three-day avg +167, seven-day avg +148) and the recent release suggest steady word-of-mouth and community adoption rather than a specific viral event.
llmSummary.whyTrending: It combines the hottest trends — AI agents, automation, and career optimization — into a single, well-documented tool that delivers tangible results (the author claims 740+ evaluations, 100+ CVs, and a landed role). The multi-language README, Discord community, and support for multiple AI backends (Claude, Gemini, OpenCode) lower the barrier for global adoption.
llmSummary.developerTakeaway: This is a blueprint for building agentic workflows that integrate multiple AI models, browser automation (Playwright), and a Go dashboard. Developers can learn how to structure a modular CLI tool with slash commands, batch processing, and human-in-the-loop safeguards.
llmSummary.developerInsight: Career-Ops signals a shift toward AI-as-infrastructure for personal productivity. Developers should watch for similar 'AI command center' patterns emerging in other domains (e.g., personal finance, health, learning). The project's architecture — using AI to orchestrate sub-agents, parse unstructured data, and generate structured outputs — is a template for building reliable, user-facing AI tools.
llmSummary.targetUsers: Job seekers in tech (especially AI/ML roles), career changers, and developers who want to automate their job search without sacrificing quality. Also relevant for recruiters and HR professionals looking to understand AI-driven candidate matching.
llmSummary.riskNotes: The system relies on third-party AI APIs (Claude, Gemini) which may change pricing or availability. The 'spray-and-pray' warning is important — users must review AI-generated applications to avoid reputational damage. The project's rapid growth may attract low-quality forks or misuse.

llmSummary.oneLiner: A DeepSeek-native AI coding agent for the terminal, rewritten in Go with prefix-cache stability and MCP plugin support.
llmSummary.problemSolved: Provides a config-driven, plugin-extensible AI coding assistant that leverages DeepSeek's prefix caching to reduce token costs during long sessions, while offering a single static binary for easy distribution.
llmSummary.whyNow: With 18,955 stars and a sustained 7-day average of 652 stars per day, this project is experiencing massive organic growth. The 24-hour delta of 402 stars and acceleration of 0.6 indicate a steady, high-velocity trend without sudden spikes, suggesting deep community adoption rather than a viral event.
llmSummary.whatChanged: The project recently underwent a ground-up rewrite in Go (version 1.0), moving from TypeScript to a single static binary. This major release, along with active development (commits within 7 days) and a recent release within 30 days, likely drove renewed attention and migration from the legacy version.
llmSummary.whyTrending: It combines the popularity of DeepSeek models with a polished terminal experience, plugin system (MCP), and strong performance optimizations. The Go rewrite promises better performance and easier distribution, appealing to developers seeking a lightweight, local AI coding agent.
llmSummary.developerTakeaway: Reasonix demonstrates how to build a practical, configurable AI agent that prioritizes cost efficiency and extensibility. Its plugin architecture and permission system offer a blueprint for integrating LLMs into developer workflows safely.
llmSummary.developerInsight: The project signals a shift toward specialized, model-native agents that optimize for specific LLM features (like prefix caching). For AI developers, it highlights the importance of tool-use safety (sandboxing, permissions) and the value of composable, multi-model setups.
llmSummary.targetUsers: Developers who use DeepSeek models and want a terminal-based AI coding assistant with plugin support, especially those who prefer a configurable, privacy-respecting local tool over cloud IDEs.
llmSummary.riskNotes: Heavy reliance on DeepSeek's API and prefix caching may limit portability to other providers. The project is still early (1.0 rewrite), and 209 open issues suggest active but potentially rough edges. MCP plugin ecosystem is nascent.

llmSummary.oneLiner: Local-first, open-source Claude Design alternative that turns coding agents into design engines via MCP, with 150+ design systems and 260+ plugins.
llmSummary.problemSolved: Design tools are closed, agent-native loops are proprietary, and teams lack a local-first, open-source way to generate brand-consistent prototypes, decks, images, and videos directly from their coding agents (Claude Code, Codex, Cursor, etc.) without pixel-pushing in Figma.
llmSummary.whyNow: With 60,395 stars, a 24-hour star delta of 882, and a 7-day average of 567.6, this project shows sustained, high-velocity growth. The acceleration ratio of 1.4 indicates strong but not explosive momentum. The recent 0.9.0 release with built-in Model Router and the Open Design Fellow program signal active development and community building, making it a top-tier open-source design tool for the agent era.
llmSummary.whatChanged: The release of version 0.9.0 with an integrated Model Router (no setup required) and the launch of the Open Design Fellow program are the most recent triggers. The README also highlights expanded agent support (21 CLIs) and a growing plugin ecosystem.
llmSummary.whyTrending: It fills a clear gap: an open-source, local-first alternative to Claude Design that works with any major coding agent, offering a vast library of design systems and plugins. The 'Figma alternative for the agent era' positioning resonates with developers who want agent-native design workflows without vendor lock-in.
llmSummary.developerTakeaway: Open Design enables developers to generate production-ready UI artifacts directly from their coding agents, reducing context switching between design and code. It's a practical way to enforce brand consistency across agent-generated outputs.
llmSummary.developerInsight: This signals a shift toward agent-native design tools where the CLI becomes the design engine. For AI developers, it means design systems can be codified as `DESIGN.md` files and consumed by any MCP-compatible agent, opening up new workflows for automated prototyping and brand governance.
llmSummary.targetUsers: Developers and designers using coding agents (Claude Code, Codex, Cursor, etc.) who want to generate design artifacts locally without a cloud subscription; teams seeking an open-source Figma alternative for agent-era prototyping.
llmSummary.riskNotes: The project is still in early stages (0.9.0) with 332 open issues. Reliance on MCP and agent compatibility may break as agents update. The large star count may attract maintenance pressure. The 'open-source Claude Design alternative' branding could invite legal scrutiny from Anthropic.

llmSummary.oneLiner: CopilotKit is a multi-platform SDK for building agent-native applications with Generative UI, shared state, and human-in-the-loop workflows across React, Angular, Vue, React Native, Slack, and Teams.
llmSummary.problemSolved: Developers need a unified frontend stack to integrate AI agents into any application surface, enabling dynamic UI rendering, real-time state synchronization, and human-in-the-loop interactions without building custom infrastructure.
llmSummary.whyNow: The repo gained 973 stars in the last 24 hours and 1,367 in the last 7 days, with a 7.9x acceleration ratio (high). This sudden breakout from a sustained base of ~33k stars signals a major attention spike, likely driven by a new release or announcement.
llmSummary.whatChanged: The README mentions recent support for Angular, Vue, React Native, Slack, and Microsoft Teams, plus a new 'Self-Learning Agents' feature in early access. The project also introduced the AG-UI Protocol, which has been adopted by Google, LangChain, AWS, Microsoft, Mastra, and PydanticAI. These expansions and partnerships likely triggered the surge.
llmSummary.whyTrending: CopilotKit is trending because it offers a comprehensive, multi-platform solution for agentic UI that works with existing frameworks and platforms, backed by a strong protocol (AG-UI) gaining industry adoption. The combination of Generative UI, shared state, and human-in-the-loop addresses a critical gap in agent deployment.
llmSummary.developerTakeaway: If you're building AI agents that need to interact with users across web, mobile, and chat platforms, CopilotKit provides a ready-made frontend stack that handles UI rendering, state, and approvals out of the box.
llmSummary.developerInsight: This signals a shift toward 'agent-native' applications where the UI is dynamically generated by agents, not hardcoded. Developers should consider adopting protocols like AG-UI to future-proof their agent integrations across surfaces.
llmSummary.targetUsers: Full-stack developers building AI-powered applications, especially those using React, Angular, Vue, or React Native, and teams deploying agents to Slack or Microsoft Teams.
llmSummary.riskNotes: The project is still evolving with early access features (Self-Learning, Slack/Teams). The high number of open issues (532) may indicate growing pains. Dependency on the AG-UI protocol could lock users into CopilotKit's ecosystem.

ECC provides a unified system of skills, hooks, memory persistence, and security scanning that works across Claude Code, Codex, Cursor, OpenCode, and others, reducing token waste and improving agent reliability.
llmSummary.whyNow: With 209K+ stars, 854 stars in the last 24 hours, and a 7-day average of 1,400 stars/day, ECC is experiencing sustained explosive growth. The acceleration of 0.6 indicates steady momentum rather than a sudden spike. The project has a recent release (v2.0.0-rc.1) and active commits within 7 days, signaling ongoing development. These features expand the system's surface area and likely drove the recent star acceleration. The README also highlights new guides and community translations, which may have increased discoverability.
llmSummary.whyTrending: ECC addresses a critical pain point for developers using AI coding agents: fragmentation and inconsistency across tools. By offering a cross-harness optimization system with a large skill library (251 skills, 63 agents), it provides immediate value. The MIT license, active community (170+ contributors), and regular releases build trust and virality.
llmSummary.developerTakeaway: ECC is a must-try for any developer using multiple AI coding assistants. It offers a ready-made system to improve agent performance, reduce token costs, and enforce security. The selective install and cross-harness support lower the barrier to adoption.
llmSummary.developerInsight: The rise of ECC signals a shift from single-agent workflows to multi-harness orchestration. Developers are seeking unified tooling that optimizes agent behavior across platforms. This trend suggests that the future of AI-assisted development will involve standardized 'agent operating systems' rather than isolated tools.
llmSummary.targetUsers: Developers and teams using Claude Code, Codex, Cursor, OpenCode, or other AI coding agents who want to optimize performance, reduce costs, and enforce security across their agent workflows.
llmSummary.riskNotes: The project is primarily maintained by a single developer (affaan-m), which could pose bus-factor risk. The rapid growth may lead to scalability challenges in support and documentation. Some features (e.g., ECC 2.0 Rust alpha) are experimental and may not be production-ready.

repository.name: ColossalAI
repository.description: Making large AI models cheaper, faster and more accessible

selectedProjects.whyItMatters: Local LLM / Inference 方向出现突然加速：24h stars +2，前 3 日均值 0.7，加速度 3x，今天值得优先排查触发原因。
selectedProjects.developerInsight: 重点看部署复杂度、性能边界和模型兼容性，判断是否能进入本地 AI 应用栈。

llmSummary.oneLiner: Colossal-AI is an open-source deep learning system that makes large AI models cheaper, faster, and more accessible through advanced parallelism and heterogeneous memory management.
llmSummary.problemSolved: Training and deploying large AI models (e.g., LLMs, video generation models) is prohibitively expensive and complex. Colossal-AI reduces cost and time by providing efficient distributed training and inference with minimal code changes.
llmSummary.whyNow: The repo has a sudden breakout with an acceleration of 6 (high), despite a low 7-day average star delta of -0.6. With 41,385 total stars and 4,505 forks, it's a well-established project that recently saw a spike in attention, possibly due to new benchmarks (B200 GPUs showing 50-70% throughput gains) or the release of Open-Sora and DeepSeek fine-tuning guides.
llmSummary.whatChanged: No single obvious trigger — the project appears to be sustaining organic growth. However, recent README updates highlight new benchmarks on B200 GPUs, DeepSeek 671B fine-tuning, and Open-Sora video generation, which may have driven the breakout.
llmSummary.whyTrending: It offers a practical, cost-saving solution for training large models (e.g., 30% cost reduction with FP8), supports cutting-edge hardware (B200, H200), and provides turnkey examples for popular models like LLaMA, GPT, and Stable Diffusion.
llmSummary.developerTakeaway: Colossal-AI is a powerful tool for developers who need to scale model training or inference without deep distributed systems expertise. Its support for multiple parallelism strategies and heterogeneous memory makes it versatile for both research and production.

aihotHighlights.title: Harness-1：基于强化学习训练的有状态搜索20B检索子智能体
aihotHighlights.summary: UIUC与Chroma联合推出Harness-1，一个20B参数的检索子智能体。它通过强化学习在一个有状态搜索框架中训练，该框架维护候选池、重要性标注集、证据图和验证记录，由策略决定搜索、筛选、验证及停止的时机。Harness-1在8个基准测试上达到0.730平均curated recall，比下一个最佳开源子智能体高出11.4个百分点，仅落后于Opus-4.6。模型权重和框架代码均已公开。

aihotHighlights.title: 五个实验室，五个心智：用小模型构建多模型金融剧情游戏
aihotHighlights.summary: Thousand Token Wood v2使用四个不同实验室的小模型（gpt-oss-20b、MiniCPM3-4B、Nemotron-Mini-4B及微调Qwen 0.5B）驱动金融模拟游戏的智能体。核心发现是异构服务层摩擦在于vLLM 0.22.1需CUDA工具包，而非模型本身。通过容忍性JSON解析层，添加模型只需一条配置。信息隔离确保内幕标志不在提示词中，扫描测试验证无泄露。记忆用情绪摘要截断避免淹没。微调0.5B模型实现0%自成交、100%有效报价，真相防火墙零泄露。小模型是可靠格式生成器但不可靠推理器，可通过结构化、提示词和微调弥补。

aihotHighlights.title: Job Searcher
aihotHighlights.summary: Hugging Face 发布 Job Searcher，一个基于 AI 的求职搜索工具。用户上传简历并设定偏好后，系统使用教师模型 DeepSeek V4 Pro 生成 LinkedIn 搜索查询，通过 JobSpy 抓取职位，再对学生模型 Qwen3-8B（8B 参数）进行 LoRA 微调，对每个职位从技能匹配、经验相关性、教育背景、行业领域契合度和资历对齐五个维度给出评分和推理。训练在 Modal 平台单张 A100 上完成。推理部署于 Hugging Face ZeroGPU Space，使用 llama.cpp 实现流式输出。项目开源。
aihotHighlights.description: Hugging Face 发布 Job Searcher，一个基于 AI 的求职搜索工具。用户上传简历并设定偏好后，系统使用教师模型 DeepSeek V4 Pro 生成 LinkedIn 搜索查询，通过 JobSpy 抓取职位，再对学生模型 Qwen3-8B（8B 参数）进行 LoRA 微调，对每个职位从技能匹配、经验相关性、教育背景、行业领域契合度和资历对齐五个维度给出评分和推理。训练在 Modal 平台单张 A100 上完成。推理部署于 Hugging Face ZeroGPU Space，使用 llama.cpp 实现流式输出。项目开源。

aihotHighlights.title: GitHub 开源 Spec Kit 工具包，用产品规范引导 AI 编码
aihotHighlights.summary: GitHub 发布开源工具包 Spec Kit，旨在解决 "vibe coding" 的最大弱点--AI 常在规则未明确时就开始编码。它把流程从 "让 AI 直接构建" 改为 "先写产品规范，再让 AI 根据规范实现"。当前 AI 编码模式常因松散提示直接跳入代码，导致需求薄弱、边界遗漏和反复返工。Spec Kit 推动反向流程：先定义产品功能，再澄清差距、制订技术计划、分解任务，最后让 agent 执行。规范成为可执行的开发合约，支持 Copilot、Claude Code、Codex、Gemini、Cursor、Qwen 等 30+ agent 集成。项目已获 109K+ 星标。

aihotHighlights.title: OpenCV 5 发布：升级全新 DNN 引擎、原生支持大模型
aihotHighlights.summary: OpenCV 5 正式发布，采用基于图的 DNN 引擎，ONNX 算子覆盖率从 4.x 的不到 23% 提升至超 80%，原生支持 Transformer、视觉语言模型（VLM）和大语言模型（LLM）。其他更新包括：更好的 Python 集成与命名参数、更紧凑核心代码、清晰硬件加速层、原生 FP16/BF16、规范化 0D/1D 张量、扩展 3D 视觉及现代化文档。该库 GitHub 拥有超 86，000 stars，每日安装量超一百万次。

aihotHighlights.title: Persona Atlas：Hugging Face 上的开源人物思维映射工具
aihotHighlights.summary: Persona Atlas 是一个运行在 Hugging Face Inference Providers 上的开源项目。它通过工具调用代理执行真实网络搜索，生成公众人物的资料、事实清单和风格假设，然后让该人物回答十个关于身份、伦理等开放式问题。每个回答被转化为嵌入向量，从而在向量空间中对不同人物进行距离比较，并基于十个特质锚点绘制热力图。前端采用 Gradio，提供研究、比较和检查代理完整追溯三个标签页，预设多个人物角色，无需 token 即可直接体验。

aihotHighlights.title: PixelDiT入选CVPR2026最佳论文决赛
aihotHighlights.summary: 被选为 #CVPR2026 最佳论文决赛作品：来自 NVIDIA Research 的 PixelDiT 在大多数图像生成模型中，预训练的自编码器会在任何扩散发生前压缩图像，导致质量损失在整个流程中累积。 PixelDiT，即像素扩散变换器，完全去掉了这一步骤。它是一个单阶段模型，直接在像素空间中端到端地学习扩散过程。

aihotHighlights.title: 用Qwen2.5-3B构建多智能体经济体：工程报告
aihotHighlights.summary: 开发者用Qwen2.5-3B构建了五人森林生物多智能体经济体，每个智能体独立运行，通过vLLM部署在Modal，以Gradio为交互窗口。3B模型在100%调用中输出有效JSON，但经济判断能力弱。通过设计稀缺性（食物品种限制、易腐坏、冬季燃料危机）和优化提示词（禁止买入自产物品、给出示例）提升决策质量。15轮模拟中，蜜价从10跌至3、柴价从4涨至7、财富基尼系数从0.14扩至0.38。项目展示了小模型可靠格式化与不可靠推理之间的工程填补。

aihotHighlights.title: Arena 发布真实世界 AI 智能体排行榜 Agent Arena
aihotHighlights.summary: Arena 推出基于真实用户任务的智能体排行榜，评估模型在代码编写、应用构建、文档分析等工作中的表现，而非孤立基准。排行榜基于30万+任务、200万+工具调用和4000万行代码，综合任务成功、纠正遵从性、错误恢复、用户表扬与抱怨、工具幻觉等信号。前三名：GPT-5.5 High（+10.7%）、Claude Opus 4.7 Thinking（+9.5%）、GPT-5.4 High（+8.9%）。

multiSourceItems.title: Harness-1：基于强化学习训练的有状态搜索20B检索子智能体
multiSourceItems.summary: UIUC与Chroma联合推出Harness-1，一个20B参数的检索子智能体。它通过强化学习在一个有状态搜索框架中训练，该框架维护候选池、重要性标注集、证据图和验证记录，由策略决定搜索、筛选、验证及停止的时机。Harness-1在8个基准测试上达到0.730平均curated recall，比下一个最佳开源子智能体高出11.4个百分点，仅落后于Opus-4.6。模型权重和框架代码均已公开。

multiSourceItems.title: 五个实验室，五个心智：用小模型构建多模型金融剧情游戏
multiSourceItems.summary: Thousand Token Wood v2使用四个不同实验室的小模型（gpt-oss-20b、MiniCPM3-4B、Nemotron-Mini-4B及微调Qwen 0.5B）驱动金融模拟游戏的智能体。核心发现是异构服务层摩擦在于vLLM 0.22.1需CUDA工具包，而非模型本身。通过容忍性JSON解析层，添加模型只需一条配置。信息隔离确保内幕标志不在提示词中，扫描测试验证无泄露。记忆用情绪摘要截断避免淹没。微调0.5B模型实现0%自成交、100%有效报价，真相防火墙零泄露。小模型是可靠格式生成器但不可靠推理器，可通过结构化、提示词和微调弥补。

multiSourceItems.title: Job Searcher
multiSourceItems.summary: Hugging Face 发布 Job Searcher，一个基于 AI 的求职搜索工具。用户上传简历并设定偏好后，系统使用教师模型 DeepSeek V4 Pro 生成 LinkedIn 搜索查询，通过 JobSpy 抓取职位，再对学生模型 Qwen3-8B（8B 参数）进行 LoRA 微调，对每个职位从技能匹配、经验相关性、教育背景、行业领域契合度和资历对齐五个维度给出评分和推理。训练在 Modal 平台单张 A100 上完成。推理部署于 Hugging Face ZeroGPU Space，使用 llama.cpp 实现流式输出。项目开源。

multiSourceItems.title: GitHub 开源 Spec Kit 工具包，用产品规范引导 AI 编码
multiSourceItems.summary: GitHub 发布开源工具包 Spec Kit，旨在解决 "vibe coding" 的最大弱点--AI 常在规则未明确时就开始编码。它把流程从 "让 AI 直接构建" 改为 "先写产品规范，再让 AI 根据规范实现"。当前 AI 编码模式常因松散提示直接跳入代码，导致需求薄弱、边界遗漏和反复返工。Spec Kit 推动反向流程：先定义产品功能，再澄清差距、制订技术计划、分解任务，最后让 agent 执行。规范成为可执行的开发合约，支持 Copilot、Claude Code、Codex、Gemini、Cursor、Qwen 等 30+ agent 集成。项目已获 109K+ 星标。

multiSourceItems.title: OpenCV 5 发布：升级全新 DNN 引擎、原生支持大模型
multiSourceItems.summary: OpenCV 5 正式发布，采用基于图的 DNN 引擎，ONNX 算子覆盖率从 4.x 的不到 23% 提升至超 80%，原生支持 Transformer、视觉语言模型（VLM）和大语言模型（LLM）。其他更新包括：更好的 Python 集成与命名参数、更紧凑核心代码、清晰硬件加速层、原生 FP16/BF16、规范化 0D/1D 张量、扩展 3D 视觉及现代化文档。该库 GitHub 拥有超 86，000 stars，每日安装量超一百万次。

multiSourceItems.title: Persona Atlas：Hugging Face 上的开源人物思维映射工具
multiSourceItems.summary: Persona Atlas 是一个运行在 Hugging Face Inference Providers 上的开源项目。它通过工具调用代理执行真实网络搜索，生成公众人物的资料、事实清单和风格假设，然后让该人物回答十个关于身份、伦理等开放式问题。每个回答被转化为嵌入向量，从而在向量空间中对不同人物进行距离比较，并基于十个特质锚点绘制热力图。前端采用 Gradio，提供研究、比较和检查代理完整追溯三个标签页，预设多个人物角色，无需 token 即可直接体验。

multiSourceItems.title: 阶跃首席科学家张祥雨合著论文 ResNet 获 CVPR 2026 「时间检验奖」
PixelDiT入选CVPR2026最佳论文决赛
multiSourceItems.summary: 被选为 #CVPR2026 最佳论文决赛作品：来自 NVIDIA Research 的 PixelDiT 在大多数图像生成模型中，预训练的自编码器会在任何扩散发生前压缩图像，导致质量损失在整个流程中累积。 PixelDiT，即像素扩散变换器，完全去掉了这一步骤。它是一个单阶段模型，直接在像素空间中端到端地学习扩散过程。

multiSourceItems.title: 用Qwen2.5-3B构建多智能体经济体：工程报告
multiSourceItems.summary: 开发者用Qwen2.5-3B构建了五人森林生物多智能体经济体，每个智能体独立运行，通过vLLM部署在Modal，以Gradio为交互窗口。3B模型在100%调用中输出有效JSON，但经济判断能力弱。通过设计稀缺性（食物品种限制、易腐坏、冬季燃料危机）和优化提示词（禁止买入自产物品、给出示例）提升决策质量。15轮模拟中，蜜价从10跌至3、柴价从4涨至7、财富基尼系数从0.14扩至0.38。项目展示了小模型可靠格式化与不可靠推理之间的工程填补。

multiSourceItems.title: Arena 发布真实世界 AI 智能体排行榜 Agent Arena
multiSourceItems.summary: Arena 推出基于真实用户任务的智能体排行榜，评估模型在代码编写、应用构建、文档分析等工作中的表现，而非孤立基准。排行榜基于30万+任务、200万+工具调用和4000万行代码，综合任务成功、纠正遵从性、错误恢复、用户表扬与抱怨、工具幻觉等信号。前三名：GPT-5.5 High（+10.7%）、Claude Opus 4.7 Thinking（+9.5%）、GPT-5.4 High（+8.9%）。

multiSourceItems.title: Suno Voices 使用指南：6 个技巧打造高质量人声录制
multiSourceItems.summary: Suno Voices 面向 Web 付费用户开放。提升人声质量的 6 个技巧：在安静环境录音以减少背景噪音；先练习歌词再正式录制；不必追求完美，保留真实情感；录音时长尽量超过 1 分钟以提供更多学习素材；将人声匹配到合适的音乐流派（如民谣、流行、死亡金属、波萨诺瓦等）；敢于尝试不同风格以发现惊喜。这些技巧旨在帮助用户获得更个性化、表现力更强的声音效果。
multiSourceItems.description: Suno Voices 面向 Web 付费用户开放。提升人声质量的 6 个技巧：在安静环境录音以减少背景噪音；先练习歌词再正式录制；不必追求完美，保留真实情感；录音时长尽量超过 1 分钟以提供更多学习素材；将人声匹配到合适的音乐流派（如民谣、流行、死亡金属、波萨诺瓦等）；敢于尝试不同风格以发现惊喜。这些技巧旨在帮助用户获得更个性化、表现力更强的声音效果。

trendEntities.title: Harness-1：基于强化学习训练的有状态搜索20B检索子智能体
normalizedKeys: title:harness 1 基于强化学习训练的有状态搜索20b检索子智能体

items.title: Harness-1：基于强化学习训练的有状态搜索20B检索子智能体
items.summary: UIUC与Chroma联合推出Harness-1，一个20B参数的检索子智能体。它通过强化学习在一个有状态搜索框架中训练，该框架维护候选池、重要性标注集、证据图和验证记录，由策略决定搜索、筛选、验证及停止的时机。Harness-1在8个基准测试上达到0.730平均curated recall，比下一个最佳开源子智能体高出11.4个百分点，仅落后于Opus-4.6。模型权重和框架代码均已公开。
items.description: UIUC与Chroma联合推出Harness-1，一个20B参数的检索子智能体。它通过强化学习在一个有状态搜索框架中训练，该框架维护候选池、重要性标注集、证据图和验证记录，由策略决定搜索、筛选、验证及停止的时机。Harness-1在8个基准测试上达到0.730平均curated recall，比下一个最佳开源子智能体高出11.4个百分点，仅落后于Opus-4.6。模型权重和框架代码均已公开。

raw.titleEn: Meet Harness-1： A 20B Retrieval Subagent Trained With Reinforcement Learning Inside a Stateful Search Harness on gpt-oss-20b

sourceItems.title: Harness-1：基于强化学习训练的有状态搜索20B检索子智能体
sourceItems.summary: UIUC与Chroma联合推出Harness-1，一个20B参数的检索子智能体。它通过强化学习在一个有状态搜索框架中训练，该框架维护候选池、重要性标注集、证据图和验证记录，由策略决定搜索、筛选、验证及停止的时机。Harness-1在8个基准测试上达到0.730平均curated recall，比下一个最佳开源子智能体高出11.4个百分点，仅落后于Opus-4.6。模型权重和框架代码均已公开。

items.title: 对比一下 GPT-5.5 的设计效果和 Opus 4.8 的设计效果
items.summary: 宝玉对比了GPT-5.5与Opus 4.8的设计能力，认为Opus 4.8效果远优于GPT-5.5。他使用了基于Cursor浏览器和元素标注的baoyu-design Skill，该Skill通过npx skills add JimLiu/baoyu-design安装，可在本地运行：描述屏幕需求即可生成精良HTML，点击预览中任意元素即可发出修改指令。官方推荐搭配Opus 4.8以获得最佳效果。工具GitHub仓库：https：//github.com/JimLiu/baoyu-design。

items.title: M3与Opus代码审计13个bug：$0.07 vs $1.30
items.summary: 对 Claude Opus 4.8 和 MiniMax M3 进行相同的代码审计：同一代码库、同一提示词，预先植入 17 个已知 bug。MiniMax M3 以 $0.07 抓到 13 个；最便宜的 Claude 运行同样抓到 13 个，花费 $1.30。MiniMax 表示这一对比非常有趣，绝对值得一读。

trendEntities.title: 五个实验室，五个心智：用小模型构建多模型金融剧情游戏
normalizedKeys: title:五个实验室 五个心智 用小模型构建多模型金融剧情游戏

items.title: 五个实验室，五个心智：用小模型构建多模型金融剧情游戏
items.summary: Thousand Token Wood v2使用四个不同实验室的小模型（gpt-oss-20b、MiniCPM3-4B、Nemotron-Mini-4B及微调Qwen 0.5B）驱动金融模拟游戏的智能体。核心发现是异构服务层摩擦在于vLLM 0.22.1需CUDA工具包，而非模型本身。通过容忍性JSON解析层，添加模型只需一条配置。信息隔离确保内幕标志不在提示词中，扫描测试验证无泄露。记忆用情绪摘要截断避免淹没。微调0.5B模型实现0%自成交、100%有效报价，真相防火墙零泄露。小模型是可靠格式生成器但不可靠推理器，可通过结构化、提示词和微调弥补。

trendEntities.title: GitHub 开源 Spec Kit 工具包，用产品规范引导 AI 编码
normalizedKeys: title:github 开源 spec kit 工具包 用产品规范引导 ai 编码

items.title: GitHub 开源 Spec Kit 工具包，用产品规范引导 AI 编码
items.summary: GitHub 发布开源工具包 Spec Kit，旨在解决 "vibe coding" 的最大弱点--AI 常在规则未明确时就开始编码。它把流程从 "让 AI 直接构建" 改为 "先写产品规范，再让 AI 根据规范实现"。当前 AI 编码模式常因松散提示直接跳入代码，导致需求薄弱、边界遗漏和反复返工。Spec Kit 推动反向流程：先定义产品功能，再澄清差距、制订技术计划、分解任务，最后让 agent 执行。规范成为可执行的开发合约，支持 Copilot、Claude Code、Codex、Gemini、Cursor、Qwen 等 30+ agent 集成。项目已获 109K+ 星标。

trendEntities.title: OpenCV 5 发布：升级全新 DNN 引擎、原生支持大模型
normalizedKeys: title:opencv 5 发布 升级全新 dnn 引擎 原生支持大模型

items.title: OpenCV 5 发布：升级全新 DNN 引擎、原生支持大模型
items.summary: OpenCV 5 正式发布，采用基于图的 DNN 引擎，ONNX 算子覆盖率从 4.x 的不到 23% 提升至超 80%，原生支持 Transformer、视觉语言模型（VLM）和大语言模型（LLM）。其他更新包括：更好的 Python 集成与命名参数、更紧凑核心代码、清晰硬件加速层、原生 FP16/BF16、规范化 0D/1D 张量、扩展 3D 视觉及现代化文档。该库 GitHub 拥有超 86，000 stars，每日安装量超一百万次。

trendEntities.title: PixelDiT入选CVPR2026最佳论文决赛

items.title: PixelDiT入选CVPR2026最佳论文决赛
items.summary: 被选为 #CVPR2026 最佳论文决赛作品：来自 NVIDIA Research 的 PixelDiT 在大多数图像生成模型中，预训练的自编码器会在任何扩散发生前压缩图像，导致质量损失在整个流程中累积。 PixelDiT，即像素扩散变换器，完全去掉了这一步骤。它是一个单阶段模型，直接在像素空间中端到端地学习扩散过程。

trendEntities.title: Arena 发布真实世界 AI 智能体排行榜 Agent Arena
normalizedKeys: title:arena 发布真实世界 ai 智能体排行榜 agent arena

items.title: Arena 发布真实世界 AI 智能体排行榜 Agent Arena
items.summary: Arena 推出基于真实用户任务的智能体排行榜，评估模型在代码编写、应用构建、文档分析等工作中的表现，而非孤立基准。排行榜基于30万+任务、200万+工具调用和4000万行代码，综合任务成功、纠正遵从性、错误恢复、用户表扬与抱怨、工具幻觉等信号。前三名：GPT-5.5 High（+10.7%）、Claude Opus 4.7 Thinking（+9.5%）、GPT-5.4 High（+8.9%）。

trendEntities.title: SpaceX与Google达成云计算新协议

items.title: SpaceX与Google达成云计算新协议
items.summary: SpaceX 刚刚披露了一份与 Google 的新云服务协议。 Google 将每月向 SpaceX 支付 9.2 亿美元（约合每年 110 亿美元），用于 xAI 数据中心的计算能力。 这再次表明，AI 算力正成为一种战略性商品，就像发射能力或能源一样，而那些能够为庞大的 GPU 集群提供资金、电力、冷却和运营的公司，可能会在其原有业务之外获得巨大的杠杆优势。

trendEntities.title: 微软Project Mosaic：micro-LED光学互连技术
normalizedKeys: title:微软project mosaic micro led光学互连技术

items.title: 微软Project Mosaic：micro-LED光学互连技术
items.summary: 微软Azure CTO Mark Russinovich在Build 2026上介绍Project Mosaic，这是微软剑桥研究院的实验性光学互连技术，采用micro-LED实现低功耗、高速数据传输。高级研究员Kaoutar Benyahya现场演示单个LED调制形成字母，证明概念具备实时响应能力。

trendEntities.title: 五角大楼正运营着一个针对拉丁美洲的人工智能宣传机器
normalizedKeys: title:五角大楼正运营着一个针对拉丁美洲的人工智能宣传机器

items.title: 五角大楼正运营着一个针对拉丁美洲的人工智能宣传机器
items.summary: 据 The Intercept 6月5日报道，美国五角大楼正在运营一个针对拉丁美洲的人工智能宣传机器（AI propaganda mill）。报道指出，该机器利用 AI 技术生成并传播宣传内容，目标为拉丁美洲地区。该消息在 Hacker News 上获得 100 点热度。

trendEntities.title: Google AI 本周产品更新：Nano Banana 2、Co-Scientist、dreambeans、Gemma 4 等
normalizedKeys: title:google ai 本周产品更新 nano banana 2 co scientist dreambeans gemma 4 等

items.title: Google AI 本周产品更新：Nano Banana 2、Co-Scientist、dreambeans、Gemma 4 等
items.summary: Google AI 本周发布多项更新：Nano Banana 2 及 Pro 正式 GA，可通过 Gemini Enterprise Agent Platform、Gemini API 和 Google AI Studio 获取；Co-Scientist 多智能体系统面向科研自动生成优化新假设；Google Labs 推出 dreambeans，根据用户 Google 应用数据每日生成个性化话题集；Gemma 4 12B 统一无编码器多模态模型可完全离线运行于笔记本；Gemma 4 系列及草稿模型引入 QAT 降低内存需求；Google Magenta RealTime 2 开源实时音乐模型，支持 MIDI 键盘、文本提示和手势演奏。
items.description: Google AI 本周发布多项更新：Nano Banana 2 及 Pro 正式 GA，可通过 Gemini Enterprise Agent Platform、Gemini API 和 Google AI Studio 获取；Co-Scientist 多智能体系统面向科研自动生成优化新假设；Google Labs 推出 dreambeans，根据用户 Google 应用数据每日生成个性化话题集；Gemma 4 12B 统一无编码器多模态模型可完全离线运行于笔记本；Gemma 4 系列及草稿模型引入 QAT 降低内存需求；Google Magenta RealTime 2 开源实时音乐模型，支持 MIDI 键盘、文本提示和手势演奏。

items.title: Gemini Live 支持实时创建编辑图像
items.summary: 你现可直接在 Gemini Live 中创建和编辑图像。 无论是测试房间装饰、解决数学问题，还是制作可分享的梗图，所有操作都实时完成。 只需打开 Gemini 应用，点击 Live 按钮，共享摄像头，告诉 Gemini 你想看到的。

items.title: Suno Voices 使用指南：6 个技巧打造高质量人声录制
items.summary: Suno Voices 面向 Web 付费用户开放。提升人声质量的 6 个技巧：在安静环境录音以减少背景噪音；先练习歌词再正式录制；不必追求完美，保留真实情感；录音时长尽量超过 1 分钟以提供更多学习素材；将人声匹配到合适的音乐流派（如民谣、流行、死亡金属、波萨诺瓦等）；敢于尝试不同风格以发现惊喜。这些技巧旨在帮助用户获得更个性化、表现力更强的声音效果。

items.title: 五个实验室，五个心智：用小模型构建多模型金融剧情游戏
items.summary: Thousand Token Wood v2使用四个不同实验室的小模型（gpt-oss-20b、MiniCPM3-4B、Nemotron-Mini-4B及微调Qwen 0.5B）驱动金融模拟游戏的智能体。核心发现是异构服务层摩擦在于vLLM 0.22.1需CUDA工具包，而非模型本身。通过容忍性JSON解析层，添加模型只需一条配置。信息隔离确保内幕标志不在提示词中，扫描测试验证无泄露。记忆用情绪摘要截断避免淹没。微调0.5B模型实现0%自成交、100%有效报价，真相防火墙零泄露。小模型是可靠格式生成器但不可靠推理器，可通过结构化、提示词和微调弥补。
items.description: Thousand Token Wood v2使用四个不同实验室的小模型（gpt-oss-20b、MiniCPM3-4B、Nemotron-Mini-4B及微调Qwen 0.5B）驱动金融模拟游戏的智能体。核心发现是异构服务层摩擦在于vLLM 0.22.1需CUDA工具包，而非模型本身。通过容忍性JSON解析层，添加模型只需一条配置。信息隔离确保内幕标志不在提示词中，扫描测试验证无泄露。记忆用情绪摘要截断避免淹没。微调0.5B模型实现0%自成交、100%有效报价，真相防火墙零泄露。小模型是可靠格式生成器但不可靠推理器，可通过结构化、提示词和微调弥补。

items.title: OpenCV 5 发布：升级全新 DNN 引擎、原生支持大模型
items.summary: OpenCV 5 正式发布，采用基于图的 DNN 引擎，ONNX 算子覆盖率从 4.x 的不到 23% 提升至超 80%，原生支持 Transformer、视觉语言模型（VLM）和大语言模型（LLM）。其他更新包括：更好的 Python 集成与命名参数、更紧凑核心代码、清晰硬件加速层、原生 FP16/BF16、规范化 0D/1D 张量、扩展 3D 视觉及现代化文档。该库 GitHub 拥有超 86，000 stars，每日安装量超一百万次。
items.description: OpenCV 5 正式发布，采用基于图的 DNN 引擎，ONNX 算子覆盖率从 4.x 的不到 23% 提升至超 80%，原生支持 Transformer、视觉语言模型（VLM）和大语言模型（LLM）。其他更新包括：更好的 Python 集成与命名参数、更紧凑核心代码、清晰硬件加速层、原生 FP16/BF16、规范化 0D/1D 张量、扩展 3D 视觉及现代化文档。该库 GitHub 拥有超 86，000 stars，每日安装量超一百万次。

items.title: 用Qwen2.5-3B构建多智能体经济体：工程报告
items.summary: 开发者用Qwen2.5-3B构建了五人森林生物多智能体经济体，每个智能体独立运行，通过vLLM部署在Modal，以Gradio为交互窗口。3B模型在100%调用中输出有效JSON，但经济判断能力弱。通过设计稀缺性（食物品种限制、易腐坏、冬季燃料危机）和优化提示词（禁止买入自产物品、给出示例）提升决策质量。15轮模拟中，蜜价从10跌至3、柴价从4涨至7、财富基尼系数从0.14扩至0.38。项目展示了小模型可靠格式化与不可靠推理之间的工程填补。

sourceItems.title: OpenCV 5 发布：升级全新 DNN 引擎、原生支持大模型
sourceItems.summary: OpenCV 5 正式发布，采用基于图的 DNN 引擎，ONNX 算子覆盖率从 4.x 的不到 23% 提升至超 80%，原生支持 Transformer、视觉语言模型（VLM）和大语言模型（LLM）。其他更新包括：更好的 Python 集成与命名参数、更紧凑核心代码、清晰硬件加速层、原生 FP16/BF16、规范化 0D/1D 张量、扩展 3D 视觉及现代化文档。该库 GitHub 拥有超 86，000 stars，每日安装量超一百万次。

sourceItems.title: 用Qwen2.5-3B构建多智能体经济体：工程报告
sourceItems.summary: 开发者用Qwen2.5-3B构建了五人森林生物多智能体经济体，每个智能体独立运行，通过vLLM部署在Modal，以Gradio为交互窗口。3B模型在100%调用中输出有效JSON，但经济判断能力弱。通过设计稀缺性（食物品种限制、易腐坏、冬季燃料危机）和优化提示词（禁止买入自产物品、给出示例）提升决策质量。15轮模拟中，蜜价从10跌至3、柴价从4涨至7、财富基尼系数从0.14扩至0.38。项目展示了小模型可靠格式化与不可靠推理之间的工程填补。

items.title: 对比一下 GPT-5.5 的设计效果和 Opus 4.8 的设计效果
items.summary: 宝玉对比了GPT-5.5与Opus 4.8的设计能力，认为Opus 4.8效果远优于GPT-5.5。他使用了基于Cursor浏览器和元素标注的baoyu-design Skill，该Skill通过npx skills add JimLiu/baoyu-design安装，可在本地运行：描述屏幕需求即可生成精良HTML，点击预览中任意元素即可发出修改指令。官方推荐搭配Opus 4.8以获得最佳效果。工具GitHub仓库：https：//github.com/JimLiu/baoyu-design。

items.title: GitHub 开源 Spec Kit 工具包，用产品规范引导 AI 编码
items.summary: GitHub 发布开源工具包 Spec Kit，旨在解决 "vibe coding" 的最大弱点--AI 常在规则未明确时就开始编码。它把流程从 "让 AI 直接构建" 改为 "先写产品规范，再让 AI 根据规范实现"。当前 AI 编码模式常因松散提示直接跳入代码，导致需求薄弱、边界遗漏和反复返工。Spec Kit 推动反向流程：先定义产品功能，再澄清差距、制订技术计划、分解任务，最后让 agent 执行。规范成为可执行的开发合约，支持 Copilot、Claude Code、Codex、Gemini、Cursor、Qwen 等 30+ agent 集成。项目已获 109K+ 星标。

items.title: Google AI 本周产品更新：Nano Banana 2、Co-Scientist、dreambeans、Gemma 4 等
items.summary: Google AI 本周发布多项更新：Nano Banana 2 及 Pro 正式 GA，可通过 Gemini Enterprise Agent Platform、Gemini API 和 Google AI Studio 获取；Co-Scientist 多智能体系统面向科研自动生成优化新假设；Google Labs 推出 dreambeans，根据用户 Google 应用数据每日生成个性化话题集；Gemma 4 12B 统一无编码器多模态模型可完全离线运行于笔记本；Gemma 4 系列及草稿模型引入 QAT 降低内存需求；Google Magenta RealTime 2 开源实时音乐模型，支持 MIDI 键盘、文本提示和手势演奏。

items.title: 五个实验室，五个心智：用小模型构建多模型金融剧情游戏
items.summary: Thousand Token Wood v2使用四个不同实验室的小模型（gpt-oss-20b、MiniCPM3-4B、Nemotron-Mini-4B及微调Qwen 0.5B）驱动金融模拟游戏的智能体。核心发现是异构服务层摩擦在于vLLM 0.22.1需CUDA工具包，而非模型本身。通过容忍性JSON解析层，添加模型只需一条配置。信息隔离确保内幕标志不在提示词中，扫描测试验证无泄露。记忆用情绪摘要截断避免淹没。微调0.5B模型实现0%自成交、100%有效报价，真相防火墙零泄露。小模型是可靠格式生成器但不可靠推理器，可通过结构化、提示词和微调弥补。

items.title: Persona Atlas：Hugging Face 上的开源人物思维映射工具
items.summary: Persona Atlas 是一个运行在 Hugging Face Inference Providers 上的开源项目。它通过工具调用代理执行真实网络搜索，生成公众人物的资料、事实清单和风格假设，然后让该人物回答十个关于身份、伦理等开放式问题。每个回答被转化为嵌入向量，从而在向量空间中对不同人物进行距离比较，并基于十个特质锚点绘制热力图。前端采用 Gradio，提供研究、比较和检查代理完整追溯三个标签页，预设多个人物角色，无需 token 即可直接体验。

items.title: 用Qwen2.5-3B构建多智能体经济体：工程报告
items.summary: 开发者用Qwen2.5-3B构建了五人森林生物多智能体经济体，每个智能体独立运行，通过vLLM部署在Modal，以Gradio为交互窗口。3B模型在100%调用中输出有效JSON，但经济判断能力弱。通过设计稀缺性（食物品种限制、易腐坏、冬季燃料危机）和优化提示词（禁止买入自产物品、给出示例）提升决策质量。15轮模拟中，蜜价从10跌至3、柴价从4涨至7、财富基尼系数从0.14扩至0.38。项目展示了小模型可靠格式化与不可靠推理之间的工程填补。

sourceItems.summary: 开发者用Qwen2.5-3B构建了五人森林生物多智能体经济体，每个智能体独立运行，通过vLLM部署在Modal，以Gradio为交互窗口。3B模型在100%调用中输出有效JSON，但经济判断能力弱。通过设计稀缺性（食物品种限制、易腐坏、冬季燃料危机）和优化提示词（禁止买入自产物品、给出示例）提升决策质量。15轮模拟中，蜜价从10跌至3、柴价从4涨至7、财富基尼系数从0.14扩至0.38。项目展示了小模型可靠格式化与不可靠推理之间的工程填补。

raw.titleEn: Thousand Token Wood： shipping a multi-agent economy on a 3B model

topicClusters.summary: Thousand Token Wood v2使用四个不同实验室的小模型（gpt-oss-20b、MiniCPM3-4B、Nemotron-Mini-4B及微调Qwen 0.5B）驱动金融模拟游戏的智能体。核心发现是异构服务层摩擦在于vLLM 0.22.1需CUDA工具包，而非模型本身。通过容忍性JSON解析层，添加模型只需一条配置。信息隔离确保内幕标志不在提示词中，扫描测试验证无泄露。记忆用情绪摘要截断避免淹没。微调0.5B模型实现0%自成交、100%有效报价，真相防火墙零泄露。小模型是可靠格式生成器但不可靠推理器，可通过结构化、提示词和微调弥补。
topicClusters.whyItMatters: 同一趋势被 2 个来源、7 条信号捕捉。

headline: AI workflow automation and agentic coding tools dominate attention, with career-ops and ai-engineering-from-scratch both crossing 3x+ acceleration anomalies.
